tldr: Move from Novu's open-source notification infrastructure to Batch's mobile push and in-app messaging platform with EU/GDPR posture.
why_switch: Prefer a managed mobile-first platform over self-hosted infrastructure
Want EU data residency and GDPR-native posture
Need built-in segmentation, A/B testing, and campaign UI
Reduce ops burden of running notification infra
Have a primarily mobile audience with marketing + transactional needs
what_to_export: Subscribers with identifiers and channel info
Triggering integration code points in your apps
Historical send logs (for reference, if needed)
export_method: Use the Novu API and database (if self-hosted) to export subscribers, topics, workflows, and preferences as JSON. Confirm exact endpoints and DB schema in Novu's official docs before scripting.
import_method: Integrate the Batch mobile SDKs into iOS/Android apps to register devices, then push user attributes via Batch's APIs. Recreate campaigns and in-app templates in the Batch dashboard. Use Batch's transactional API for triggered sends. Verify endpoint names and payloads in Batch's official documentation before automating bulk imports.

concept_mapping.note: Batch ties messaging to installations; map your user id to a custom user id
Marketing flows go to campaigns; triggered sends use the transactional API
Express conditions via Batch's segmentation rules
Rebuild visual styles inside Batch's template editor

gotchas: Batch is mobile-centric; web push and email coverage may be weaker than Novu's multi-channel model
Push tokens must be registered through Batch SDK on device; you cannot transfer APNs/FCM tokens directly
Identity model differs — plan how anonymous-to-known transitions should behave
Pricing scales aggressively per Batch reviews; clarify quotas before signing
If you self-host Novu today, decommissioning includes shutting down infra cleanly
Run dual-send during cutover to validate deliverability

email.subject: Migrating from Novu to Batch
email.body:
Hi team,

We're moving from Novu to Batch to drop self-hosted notification infra and lean on Batch's EU/GDPR-friendly mobile push platform.

Plan:
- Export workflows, subscribers, topics, and preferences from Novu
- Integrate Batch SDKs in iOS/Android and register installations
- Push user attributes and recreate campaigns in Batch
- Use Batch's transactional API for triggered messages
- Dual-send during cutover, then retire Novu infra

Effort: roughly 20-50 hours.

Thanks
